Partial view of a dark brown three-seat leather sofa with glossy, slightly worn upholstery, visible stitched seams and vertical tufted back cushions; the crop shows the left-to-middle section and is edge-cropped at the right, approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

Dark brown leather three-seat couch with recliner-style segmented cushions, visible vertical stitching and padded headrests and armrests; largely visible in the crop, low to the floor, appears in good condition and approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

Small rectangular picture frame with a thin dark (black) border holding a white paper insert with visible blue and black text; frame appears fully visible in the crop and is approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial close-up of a black metal (likely cast-iron) fireplace front showing layered rectangular trim and a deep black firebox opening; edge-cropped in the image and photographed approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial cream/white pleated fabric lampshade of a table lamp with an octagonal curved profile and visible dark trim, lower portion and base are cut off by the crop; appears tabletop-sized and likely photographed at roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up partial view of a matte black metal fireplace surround with layered/beveled molding and a dark firebox opening; crop is edge-cut at top/right and shows minor scuffs, estimated distance from camera ~0.6 m.

Black plastic handheld remote control with rows of small circular and rectangular buttons and a glossy reflective surface showing glare; the object is partially cropped by the image edge and appears very close to the camera (approx. 0.3 m).

Partial black glass-front fireplace with a glossy rectangular viewing panel and dark unlit interior; top surround appears jagged and cut off at the crop edge, and the reflective glass shows a lamp and stair railing reflection — appears roughly 2.0 m from the camera.

Partial/cropped dark-stained wooden side table with ornate carved vertical molding and glossy finish; top surface shows a small cloth or doily and the table is partially obscured by a dark leather sofa in the foreground, estimated about 1.2 m from the camera.

Three-quarter side view of a dark brown leather recliner with tufted backrest, padded armrests, visible side-mounted recliner lever and pronounced creasing/wear in the upholstery; chair appears upright and mostly visible but is slightly edge-cropped at the top/left, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Front-facing stainless steel oven with a dark glass window and a pair of white decorative towels draped over the handle; lower storage/drawer panel visible, slight reflections on metal surface, and the appliance is partially edge-cropped — photographed at approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with a rectangular glass door showing an inner mesh screen, illuminated interior lamps visible, and a right-side digital control panel with buttons; close-up view (approx. 0.6 m from camera) and the image is slightly low-resolution/blurred.

Two adjacent dark brown stained wooden cabinet doors with recessed rectangular panels and visible wood grain and a subtle glossy sheen; light reflection on the right door; top molding with a slight scalloped profile is visible and no handles are seen in the crop; appears largely uncropped and at close range (approx. 0.8 m).

Tall dark painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and mostly matte finish; it fills the vertical crop, shows a slight scuff/reflective area on the left, and the lower-right edge is cut off revealing a sliver of hardware — viewed from about 1.0 m away.

Dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow surrounding frame, vertical rectangular shape and matte finish; mostly visible in the crop but slightly cropped at the top edge — estimated about 1.0 m from the camera.

Edge-cropped white terry towel with faded gray printed lettering (partly reading 'LOVE' and additional indistinct text) on the lower portion; appears folded or hanging with hem visible at bottom, slight wear/fading evident, right edge is cut off in the crop; approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow molded frame; visible vertical wood grain, matte finish and minor surface wear, no handle visible and the door is mostly fully visible in the crop — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Pair of white cotton terry hand towels hanging side-by-side on a bar, each with blue-gray printed decorative text and graphics (right towel shows the word 'LOVE'), hemmed bottom edges visible, appears clean and photographed from about 0.6 m away.

Vertical rectangular white towel with a central embroidered decorative motif, faint darkening near edges, and a soft textile texture; towel is partially cut off by the crop at top and bottom and image is low-resolution/blurry; approximate distance to camera ~0.6 m.

Partial dark brown wooden cabinet front with recessed-panel door and a visible horizontal seam, slightly glossy finish with minor scuffs; the cabinet is edge-cropped in the image and sits directly behind a close-up butcher-block countertop — estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.

Partial view of a fireplace showing a dark rectangular firebox with black interior and a dark gray stone or tile hearth ledge beneath layered painted mantel molding; left side shows a carved wooden trim partially cut off by the crop — appears to be photographed from about 1.2 m away.

Edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet front with a horizontal top rail and several recessed drawer fronts separated by vertical dividers; surface appears shadowed and slightly worn, bottom edge cut off by the crop. Photographed from close range (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial, edge-cropped silver and black drip coffee maker with a visible glass carafe, control panel and base plate; small countertop unit seen close-up (approx. 0.5–1.0 m), slightly blurred and shadowed.

Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet with vertical paneled doors and a visible vertical metal handle on the right door; there is a noticeable glare/reflection on the central panel and the right edge of the cabinet is partially cropped by the image border, suggesting the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m away).

Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and a long vertical brushed-metal handle on the right; surface appears matte with slight sheen, mostly visible in the crop though slightly cropped at the top edge; estimated distance ~1.5 m from camera.

Vertical dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and rectangular frame, subtle vertical wood grain and a semi-matte finish; full panel visible in the crop with slight darker wear near the bottom; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up of a beige/off-white glazed ceramic sink rim with a glossy finish and curved circular profile; the basin interior is shadowed and the object is edge-cropped (partial) in the frame, photographed at close range (~0.5 m).

Close-up of a brass-colored curved faucet spout with a reflective metal surface and visible light tarnish/patina; the fixture is partially visible and cut off by the crop edge, mounted at a sink rim and appears to be about 0.4 m from the camera.

Close-up of a partial chrome/metal faucet spout seen vertically and cut off at the crop edge; small cylindrical metal piece with reflective highlights and a slightly worn look, photographed from close range (approximately 0.5 m).

Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical black handles and a built-in water/ice dispenser on the left door; reflective, slightly smudged surface with visible light scratches and reflections; largely visible in the crop but slightly edge-cropped at the top — estimated ~1.2 m from the camera.

Partial crop of a dark reddish-brown polished wooden dining chair showing an ornate carved openwork backrest with circular/scroll motifs and visible rear legs; lower portion is cut off by the image border and the chair appears close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m).

Partial, slightly blurred white circular clock face showing black Roman numerals and dark clock hands with a reflective metallic rim visible at the lower-right; crop is edge-cut and the image is low-resolution with glare, photographed from close range (approximately 0.5–0.8 m).

Partial/edge-cropped light brown wood-grain dining table top (likely laminate or veneered) with a visible rectangular edge, textured grain pattern, small surface wear and scattered papers/crumpled bag on the right; camera appears to be very close (approx. 0.5 m).

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and visible vertical wood grain; smooth satin finish with subtle light reflection; mostly fully visible but slightly cropped at the sides and with a small metallic/cloth occlusion near the top-left; estimated distance about 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and visible vertical wood grain; matte, slightly worn finish with some blur, no handle visible and edges are partially cropped — likely photographed at close range (~0.5 m).

Close-up of a white circular analog wall clock with black Roman numerals and thin black hands set in a reflective scalloped chrome metal frame; the bottom-right portion of the clock is edge-cropped and slightly blurred — estimated diameter ~25–30 cm and distance from camera ~0.6 m.

Dark brown wooden cabinet front with recessed rectangular panels and a horizontal seam, showing a worn matte finish with scuffs and small scratches; object appears partially edge-cropped vertically in the image and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial crop showing a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and a narrow vertical frame/stile at the right; smooth satin finish with slight sheen, no visible knob or hardware in the visible area, and a piece of cloth or paper overlapping the upper-left corner; appears to be approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and matte finish, showing faint scuff marks; right edge of the door is cropped by the image and the lower-left is partially occluded by a suitcase, appearing about 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial dark reddish-brown polished wooden dining table edge visible at lower-middle of crop, glossy finish and small portion of tabletop shown behind carved chair backs; the table is edge-cropped by the image and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).

Close-up of a dark-stained wooden cabinet with two raised rectangular paneled doors, a narrow central seam/gap, visible wood grain and subtle wear; bottom edge is cropped by the image — approximately 1.0 m from camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and a small round knob at the lower-right; surface appears worn and slightly faded with decorative top molding visible, image is low-light and mildly blurred, and the left edge of the cabinet is slightly cut off in the crop — approximate distance ~1.0 m.

Partial, edge-cropped reddish-brown wooden dining chair with a light beige upholstered seat cushion; turned front leg and horizontal stretcher are visible, crop is slightly blurred and the chair is cut off by the image border — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet with two recessed paneled doors filling most of the crop; top and side edges are cut off (edge-cropped), finish appears satin with faint reflections, and the cabinet is approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

Partial view of a dark brown leather three-seat couch with stitched, vertically tufted back cushions and padded armrest; glossy leather shows light reflections and creasing, the front/right section is occluded by a table lamp and plants and the couch is edge-cropped in the image (approx. 1.5 m from camera).

Dark leather (appears black) three-seat reclining couch with segmented, vertically stitched padded cushions and rounded armrests with visible cup-holder/control panels; shown in a full-front view, largely uncropped, photographed at approximately 2.0 meters from the camera and appearing in good condition.

Vertical rectangular picture frame with a narrow dark wood profile surrounding a white matted print containing black printed/handwritten text; frame appears intact and fully visible in the crop, image is slightly low-resolution/blurred — estimated ~1.5 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a dark bluish-black metal fireplace front showing a rectangular black firebox opening and stepped decorative molding; the unit is partially edge-cropped in the image and appears to be about 0.8 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a black/dark charcoal metal fireplace surround with stepped moulding and a matte finish; the rectangular firebox interior is deep black and recessed, the hearth ledge is visible at the bottom, and the right side of the surround is edge-cropped — approximately 1.0 m from camera.

Cream/ivory pleated fabric lampshade with a scalloped hem and small hanging tassels and decorative trim; shade is shown partially edge-cropped (lamp base not visible) and photographed at roughly ~1.0 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped black glossy recessed fireplace with a reflective glass front set into a beige wall; glass shows lamp glare and faint vertical-slat/radiator reflections, top edge appears irregular or covered, and the visible portion suggests a medium-wide unit roughly at typical living-room height — approximately 2.5 m from the camera.

Small table lamp with a cream/white pleated fabric shade and scalloped trimmed bottom, base partially visible and cut off by the bottom/right crop; appears on a nearby surface about 0.8 m from the camera, slightly soft/blurred in indoor lighting.

Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden side table with ornate carved legs and decorative molding on a glossy rectangular top, positioned immediately behind a leather recliner; table appears small, warm brown in color, and approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown leather single-seat recliner with padded, tufted back and cushioned armrests; visible reclining lever on the right side, leather surface shows creases and slight sheen indicating wear; object is edge-cropped/partial in the image and appears approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Front-facing stainless-steel oven approximately 0.8 m from the camera; the glass upper door is partially occluded by two white decorative dish towels with printed text, a horizontal handle and lower storage drawer are visible, and the metal surface shows reflections and minor smudges.

Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with a rectangular glass door showing interior lights and a right-side digital control panel and buttons; reflective metal finish with slight smudges and mild pixelation in the crop, estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet front with two recessed rectangular panel doors separated by a vertical seam, medium glossy finish with visible wood grain and light reflection, small decorative scalloped top molding, lower edge slightly cropped by the image — appears to be about 1.0 m from the camera.

Tall vertical dark-painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and molded border; surface shows scuffs, wear and slight reflections on a matte/satin finish, right-side hardware is partially visible and the left/right edges are slightly cropped — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow raised frame; vertical rectangular piece, slightly edge-cropped at the top and sides, low-gloss finish with faint scuffs and no visible hardware; appears photographed at approximately 1.0 m distance.

Light ivory/beige terrycloth towel with faded gray block-print text ("LOVE" readable), hanging vertically and folded; right side of the towel is cropped by the image edge and the print looks worn; appears to be a small hand/kitchen towel approximately 0.5 meters from the camera.

Single tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central rectangular panel and simple surrounding frame; surface shows vertical wood grain and a slight sheen, no visible hardware, and the right edge is slightly cropped; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Pair of white cotton kitchen/tea towels with blue-gray printed graphics and legible word 'LOVE' on the right towel; hanging side-by-side with lower edges slightly folded and cut off by the crop, decorative woven texture visible — photographed close-up (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

Off-white/cream rectangular hanging towel with a central symmetrical brown/gray embroidered motif, small sewn label near the bottom, light wrinkles and a short bottom fringe; fabric appears woven/terry and the left/right edges are slightly cropped in the image (approx. 1.0 m from camera).

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet front with recessed panels and a visible horizontal seam; stained finish with signs of wear, positioned behind a close light particleboard countertop — estimated distance from camera ≈ 0.6 m.

Partial view of a dark-painted rectangular fireplace opening with a stepped mantel profile, a matte finish surround, a deep black interior, and a rounded gray hearth stone visible at the base; left edge shows a partial carved wooden trim and the crop is edge-cut, photographed from about 1.2 m away.

Partial, edge-cropped black plastic drip coffee maker with stainless-steel accents and a glass carafe (handle visible on right) showing a vertical rectangular base with a small control panel; slightly blurred and photographed at approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet front with horizontal molded panels and lower drawer-like recesses, slightly worn stained finish and uneven lighting; appears to be the lower front/base of a cabinet, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed vertical panel and a slim vertical silver handle on the right; matte wood-grain finish, occupies most of the crop and is edge-cropped on the right side, estimated about 1.5 m from the camera.

Partial edge of a red-orange woven rug with a decorative patterned border and short fringed tassels visible at the left; the rug is edge-cropped (cut off by the image border) and lies on a beige tiled floor, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed panel and a vertical brushed-metal handle; occupies most of the crop and is right-edge cropped (partial view of cabinet side and wall visible); matte surface with a small top-left light reflection; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m away).

Edge-cropped tall, dark brown stained wooden cabinet door panel with a recessed central panel and raised outer frame; vertical wood grain and a matte finish are visible, no hardware is shown, and there is slight wear near the bottom — photographed close-up (approx. 0.5 m).

Partial edge-cropped off-white ceramic sink rim with a rounded glossy profile; brownish staining/discoloration is visible along the front edge and a partially visible metal drain or overflow appears at the right, photographed close-up at roughly 0.6 m.

Partial chrome-plated faucet spout visible at the right edge of the crop; cylindrical, curved neck with reflective surface and small specular highlights, set against a beige tiled background and appearing wall-mounted and close to the camera (approx. 0.4 m).

Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with vertical black handles and a built-in water/ice dispenser on the lower left door; reflective, slightly smudged surface and the appliance is partially edge-cropped at the top and sides; estimated distance ~1.5 m from camera.

Close-up of a partial, edge-cropped ornate red-brown varnished wooden chair back with circular carved motifs and slender vertical splats; the lower seat and legs are partially visible, suggesting a medium-height dining chair photographed at roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial edge-cropped white circular clock face with black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands, a silver rim and small glass reflection visible; image is slightly blurred and noisy — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Close-up of a light-brown, wood-grain dining tabletop (likely laminate or veneered) with a straight/beveled edge; surface shows mottled grain texture and light wear or staining, cropped at the left and partially covered by crumpled paper/packaging on the right; camera roughly 0.6 m above the surface.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel, visible vertical wood grain and a semi-gloss finish; no handle is visible and the top-right is slightly edge-cropped; approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and visible vertical wood grain; finish appears matte and slightly worn at the edges, crop is edge-cut/partial and shows no hardware; estimated distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Close-up of a round white clock face with black Roman numerals and black hands set in a reflective scalloped/fluted metal bezel; the bottom edge of the clock is cropped by the image, there is specular glare on the metal, and the view appears close (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark brown wooden cabinet front with a rectangular recessed central panel and horizontal molding; low-lit, slightly worn/dull finish with two darker rectangular lower drawer areas visible, appears close to the camera (≈0.7 m).

Partial view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow frame, smooth finish and vertical orientation; right edge of the door is cropped and an adjacent darker rail is visible, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Tall dark brown wooden cabinet/wardrobe door with a rectangular recessed panel and matte finish; bottom is partially occluded by a silver suitcase and the right edge of the door is cropped in the image, with faint scuffs visible on the surface; appears to be about 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany dining table showing a glossy wooden tabletop edge, underside and a leg area with chairs occluding much of the surface; photographed at an estimated distance of ~1.5 meters from the camera.

Close-up of two dark brown wooden cabinet doors with recessed rectangular panels, a narrow central seam/handle area, and visible scuffing along the lower edge; the doors are edge-cropped (partial) in the image and appear about 1.0 m from the camera.

Close-up view (≈0.8 m) of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel, simple top molding and a small round knob at the lower-right; the door appears slightly worn and the crop is edge-cropped/partial.

Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair showing the lower two-thirds: a padded red upholstered seat, curved front legs and a horizontal stretcher beneath; wood has a glossy finish and the backrest is only partially visible at the left; approximately 1.5 meters from camera.

Dark brown wooden double-door cabinet with recessed rectangular panels and a narrow vertical seam; smooth semi-gloss finish with slight reflections, mostly visible but partially occluded by a hanging pendant light and a stainless appliance at the left edge, left side slightly cut off in the crop — estimated approximately 2.0 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow frame, smooth finish and vertical orientation; right edge of the door is cropped and an adjacent darker rail is visible, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
